summary: Mixed‑quality recording of a strong San Diego show featuring a thunderous "The Other One" and a solid Lost Sailor > Saint of Circumstance suite.
review: The performance is generally praised – the band delivers a fiery "Other One" with Phil’s thunder bass, and the Lost Sailor/​Saint of Circumstance suite shines. Recording-wise the tape captures moments of clarity but suffers from monitor wash, out‑of‑phase issues and thin vocals that make parts of the set feel distant.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show highly (5‑star comments) while recording quality receives mixed feedback, yielding an overall balanced rating around four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Several reviewers note monitor wash and a “too close” front‑of‑house mix that makes the balance thin (Dire Wolf, vocals on El Paso). Some moments are crisp and clear, but out‑of‑phase issues and occasional dropouts lower overall fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is energetic with strong jams; second set starts unevenly but contains highlights like the thunderous "Other One" and solid space‑filled improvisations.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for lively playing on Cassidy, a fancy needlepoint solo, and an interesting guitar twist on Greatest, though his vocals sometimes get lost in the mix.
band_member_comments.Phil: Highlighted for delivering a thunderous bass line on "The Other One" that repeats five times—a fan‑favorite moment.
band_member_comments.Bob: Bobby’s slide on El Paso is louder than Jerry’s vocal and his vocals drop out briefly, indicating recording issues rather than performance faults.
